title: AI Governance Evidence Items
description: Evidence items that demonstrate compliance with each control. Organized by control with evidence type classification.

evidenceTypes.record: Logs, test results, audit trails, and operational records
evidenceTypes.artifact: Technical outputs, configurations, and system documentation

items.name: AI Governance Charter
items.description: Defines AI governance body, authority, scope, and reporting structure.

items.name: AI RACI Matrix
items.description: Responsibility assignment matrix for AI lifecycle activities.

items.name: Governance Meeting Minutes
items.description: Minutes from AI governance committee meetings showing oversight decisions.

items.name: Annual Governance Review Report
items.description: Annual review of governance framework effectiveness.

items.name: AI Risk Assessment Template
items.description: Standardized template for conducting AI system risk assessments.

items.name: Completed Risk Assessments
items.description: Filled risk assessments for each deployed AI system.

items.name: Risk Register
items.description: Centralized register of identified AI risks with status and mitigation.

items.name: Risk Classification Decision Log
items.description: Documentation of risk tier classification decisions with rationale.

items.name: Data Governance Policy
items.description: Policy governing collection, use, storage, and disposal of AI training data.

items.name: Data Provenance Records
items.description: Lineage documentation showing data sources, transformations, and quality checks.

items.name: Data Quality Reports
items.description: Automated data quality assessment results (completeness, accuracy, representativeness).

items.name: Data Processing Impact Assessment
items.description: DPIA or equivalent for personal data used in AI training.

items.name: Bias Testing Methodology
items.description: Documented methodology for fairness testing across protected characteristics.

items.name: Bias Test Results
items.description: Results of bias testing including fairness metrics and identified disparities.

items.name: Bias Mitigation Actions
items.description: Documented corrective actions taken to address identified bias.

items.name: Diverse Review Panel Records
items.description: Composition and findings of diverse panels reviewing AI for bias.

items.name: Validation Plan
items.description: Plan defining validation criteria, test datasets, and acceptance thresholds.

items.name: Validation Test Results
items.description: Model accuracy, precision, recall, robustness test results.

items.name: Adversarial Test Report
items.description: Results of adversarial robustness testing and security assessments.

items.name: Validation Sign-Off
items.description: Formal sign-off that model meets acceptance criteria before deployment.

items.name: AI Transparency Policy
items.description: Policy defining transparency obligations by AI system category.

items.name: AI System Registry
items.description: Published inventory of AI systems with purpose, data sources, and risk level.

items.name: User Notification Records
items.description: Evidence that users are informed of AI involvement in decisions.

items.name: Explainability Implementation
items.description: Technical documentation of explainability methods deployed (SHAP, LIME, etc.).

items.name: Human Oversight Procedures
items.description: Procedures defining when and how humans oversee AI decisions.

items.name: Operator Training Records
items.description: Evidence that human operators are trained on AI system limitations.

items.name: Override/Intervention Log
items.description: Log of human overrides, interventions, and their outcomes.

items.name: Kill Switch Test Records
items.description: Evidence of periodic testing of AI system shutdown mechanisms.

items.name: AI Incident Response Plan
items.description: Documented procedures for detecting, responding to, and recovering from AI incidents.

items.name: Incident Reports
items.description: Completed incident reports with classification, timeline, and resolution.

items.name: Post-Incident Review Reports
items.description: Root cause analysis and lessons learned from AI incidents.

items.name: Regulatory Notification Records
items.description: Evidence of serious incident notifications to regulatory authorities.

items.name: Internal Audit Schedule
items.description: Planned schedule for AI governance audits.

items.name: Audit Reports
items.description: Completed internal and external audit reports with findings.

items.name: Corrective Action Tracker
items.description: Tracking system for audit findings and corrective action completion.

items.name: Certification Records
items.description: ISO 42001 or equivalent certification certificates and scope statements.

items.name: FRIA Template
items.description: Fundamental rights impact assessment template.

items.name: Completed FRIAs
items.description: Impact assessments for high-risk AI systems.

items.name: Stakeholder Consultation Records
items.description: Records of engagement with affected communities.

items.name: Impact Monitoring Reports
items.description: Ongoing monitoring of societal impacts post-deployment.
